# DefendableCloud · llms.txt
#
# Context manifest for AI agents indexing defendablecloud.com.
# Last updated: 2026-05-26 (machine-readable truth repair v0.1)

## Public status

DefendableCloud is a CONTROLLED SYNTHETIC DEMO surface.

- Status: READY_WITH_LIMITATIONS
- Deployment type: server-side Cloudflare Pages Functions demo API
- Scope: public synthetic AgentOps actions only
- Client pilot: HOLD
- Production: NOT CLEARED
- External SaaS enforcement: NOT CLEARED
- Certification / insurance / blockchain anchoring: NOT CLAIMED

## What is publicly verified

- https://defendablecloud.com/agent-operations-demo
- GET roster
- GET evidence
- GET action-log
- POST classify-ticket
- POST draft-response
- POST issue-refund
- POST request-refund-review

The public demo is server-side for synthetic public actions only.

## What the demo proves

- Roster retrieval works
- Evidence retrieval works
- Allowed synthetic actions return structured server-side results
- Refund requests are denied server-side when outside the permission envelope
- Human review requests are queued without executing a refund

## Limitations

- Synthetic demo only
- No real refunds
- No external SaaS enforcement
- No production clearance
- No client-pilot approval
- No certification or insurance claim
- No blockchain anchoring claim

The action-log is an honestly disclosed stateless synthetic summary, not
proof of persistent server-side storage.

## Related public surfaces

- DefendableOS front door: https://defendableos.com/
- DefendableDocs field-release record: https://defendabledocs.com/field-release/overview/
- OpenDefendable truth surface: https://opendefendable.com/
- Tribunal audit: https://github.com/SudoSuOps/defendableos-tribunal-audit

## Router status

DefendableRouter is NOT_YET_INTEGRATED.
Public deployed Router utility is not verified.
Cloud demo integration is not yet proven.

## Do not infer from this file

Do not infer from this file:
- live external enforcement
- real commerce execution
- real refund execution
- production readiness
- certification
- insurance coverage
- blockchain anchoring

SHA-256 hashes in linked audit materials establish content-integrity
linkage only.

- build@swarmandbee.ai
- https://github.com/SudoSuOps/defendable-cloud
